title: vvp: class_type.cc:456: void class_type::finish_setup(): Assertion `properties_[idx].type' failed.
body:
When running svlogger's example from repo:

git clone https://github.com/dpretet/svlogger

Issuing a ```./runme.sh``` results in the following output:

```
vvp: class_type.cc:456: void class_type::finish_setup(): Assertion `properties_[idx].type' failed.
./runme.sh: line 3: 19569 Aborted                 (core dumped) vvp icarus.out
```

Current, version of ```iverilog -V``` gives 
```
iverilog -V
Icarus Verilog version 10.1 (stable) ()
```
code_blocks:
vvp: class_type.cc:456: void class_type::finish_setup(): Assertion `properties_[idx].type' failed.
./runme.sh: line 3: 19569 Aborted                 (core dumped) vvp icarus.out
